def main() -> None:
    """Main function."""
    parser = create_parser()
    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.command == "init":
        init(args)
    elif args.command == "config":
        config(args)
    else:
        parser.print_help()

def cmd_rename(args):
    """Rename a conda environment."""
    from .. import CondaManager

    cm = CondaManager()
    cm.rename_environment(args.name, args.destination)  # TODO: add force flag


def add_command_rm(p):
    """Add command to remove a conda environment."""
    p.add_argument("name", help="Name of the conda environment.")
    p.set_defaults(func=cmd_rm)

    )
    parser.add_argument(
        "file",
        nargs="?",
        type=str,
        default=None,
        help="Markdown file to convert (default: stdin)",
    )

    args = parser.parse_args()

    if args.stdin:
        md = sys.stdin.read()
    elif args.file is not None:
        with open(args.file, "r") as f:
            md = f.read()
    else:
        print("No input provided. Use --help for more information.")
        exit(1)

    html = markdown(md)
    print(html)  # noqa: T

def main():
    args = parse_args()

    # Set up logging
    logger = logging.getLogger(__name__)
    logger.setLevel(logging.DEBUG)
    logger.addHandler(logging.StreamHandler(sys.stdout))

    # Load data
    train_data, test_data = get_data(args)

    # Define model
    model = get_model(args)

    # Train model
    model.fit(train_data)
